mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO neighborhood (li_code, name, full_name, district, city, lat, lng, status) VALUES
( #{n.liCode}, #{n.name}, #{n.fullName}, #{n.district}, #{n.city}, #{n.lat}, #{n.lng}, #{n.status} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), full_name = VALUES(full_name), district = VALUES(district), city = VALUES(city), lat = VALUES(lat), lng = VALUES(lng), status = VALUES(status), updated_at = NOW()
